modules.title: Work Log
modules.short_description: Capture local session entries with a clear start and finish flow.
modules.detail: Record each work session as a simple local entry with status, count, and notes.

modules.title: Daily Plan
modules.short_description: Outline the next few local tasks for the day.
modules.detail: Keep a short work plan visible so repeated actions stay organized.

modules.title: Handover
modules.short_description: Prepare a concise end-of-session handover note.
modules.detail: Capture what is complete, what remains open, and what needs attention next.

modules.title: Notes
modules.short_description: Write local notes for handover, visit context, or follow-up reminders.
modules.detail: Notes are stored only on the device and can be cleared with app storage.

modules.title: Insights
modules.short_description: Summarize local counts and completion status.
modules.detail: A small dashboard highlights today's count, open items, and completion ratio.
